query: SELECT id, actorId, name, type, dataSource FROM threat_actors WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%aceofcloud%' OR LOWER(actorId) LIKE '%aceofcloud%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%ace of cloud%' OR LOWER(actorId) LIKE '%ace-of-cloud%' OR LOWER(aliases) LIKE '%aceofcloud%' OR LOWER(description) LIKE '%aceofcloud%'
